repo_prior_art.cite: eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1: eta=0 independent-shock cumulant-diagonalizing LP/SVAR support comparison

published_prior_art.cite: PlagborgMollerWolf2021: LP/VAR equality under common identifying restrictions

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1 and failed eid_lp_svar_nonequiv_upgrade do not define eta_w^*(P) or an eta-bounded leakage frontier

published_prior_art.cite: LanneLiuLuoto2026 handles dependent non-Gaussian shock identification under zero co-moment restrictions; no LP/sign support leakage threshold

repo_prior_art.cite: eid_lp_svar_nonequiv/v1 had an eta=0 two-shock witness but no eta-leakage residual formula over both O(2) components

published_prior_art.cite: Guay2021 gives higher-moment local rank conditions and AriasRubioRamirezWaggoner2018 gives sign/zero algorithms; neither gives the eta_w^*(P) formula

novelty_flags.label: upgrade_review
novelty_flags.one_line: PN5 cluster lock is only partially satisfied: parent v1 locked params are partial-identification / LP-IRF support functions, while this proposal relocks to ExactID despite still comparing support functions h_LP and h_eta.

soundness_flags.label: Locked parameters / Section 4
soundness_flags.one_line: The proposal says the anchor is ExactID and 'not PartialID', but the kernel is a support-function identified-set comparison, matching the parent partial-ID cluster.

upgrade_review.upgrade_delta_one_line: The eta-bounded leakage radius is a real generalization of the parent eta=0 premise, but the cluster relock conflicts with the parent support-function PartialID framing.

strengthening_paths.suggestion: Relock the proposal as a PartialID / structural impulse-response support-function upgrade, or add a precise explanation of why this is ExactID despite optimizing support functions over admissible shock-label sets.
Make Conjecture 1's nontrivial content the open semi-algebraic positive-finite frontier, since the support-equality iff part mostly follows from the definition of eta_w^*(P) and nested compact sets.
Add Liu's leptokurtic-shock paper or another no-excess-co-kurtosis comparator as a one-line related-work anchor for Conjecture 2's fourth-moment specialization.

recommended_next_step: Patch the cluster/coherence issue and sharpen Conjecture 1 so the flagship claim is the primitive positive-finite leakage frontier, not the definitional threshold equivalence.
